title: Find Grandma's Pictures
ticket: Grandma cannot find her family pictures after moving folders.
clue: Pictures are likely moved, not erased.
tooltip: Use Explorer filters and sort by date modified.
whyItMatters: Recovering personal files builds user trust.
careerConnection: Support roles regularly recover misplaced files.

interactiveDemo.prompt: Best way to narrow the search?

actionTask.instructions: Search for picture files, sort by date, and restore them to a clear Pictures folder.
actionTask.expectedResult: The correct photo set is restored to one location.
actionTask.screenshotExample: Explorer sorted by date with the right folder selected.

repeatTask: Repeat the photo search with another target file.
breakFixTask: Place the wrong image in the family folder, then fix it.
verificationChecklist: Can you do it without help?
ticketCompletion: Grandma has her pictures back in the right place.

translationTerms.plain: A way to narrow what you see.
The folder where downloads usually go.
translationTerms.why: Lost files often end up there.
